feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: The application 'Test your Processes' is not running.
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Public cloud Edition ,When running in the app 'Test your Processes', if you run a test process created in the 'Manage Your Test Processes' app, the percentage number should gradually increase, but it stops at 0%.

How can this be resolved?

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.Create own test processes with the "Manage Your Test Processes" app. This time, I registered the procedures for the J58 scope item myself.

2.Run the created test process in the 'test your processes' app

3.It stays at '0% complete, in process' and doesn't move for a whole day.

entry.title: How to Exclude Purchase Account (EIN) from Material Ledger (ML) Closing
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Purchase Account (transaction key EIN/EINKK) activated.

While performing the Material Ledger (ML) closing, I noticed that ML settlement postings are being generated against the Purchase Account. I only needed the pure purchase amount in this account, but I found that settlement amounts are being distributed to it as well.

Could anyone who knows how to prevent the ML closing from posting to the Purchase Account please share the solution?

Thank you.

entry.title: 生产订单是否可以提前下到下一个月，对财务是否有影响
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team，

由于紧急情况，想咨询生产订单是否可以提前下到下一个月？

entry.title: SAP Make-to-Order Policy: When entering the manufacturing version and storage location, the manufact
entry.content:
We have set up a make-to-order strategy (strategy 20) in the material master.

We specify a storage location for the sales order line item.

We also specify the same storage location for the manufacturing version's goods receipt storage.

When we run MRP in this state, no manufacturing versions are selected at all.

The requirement is that the storage locations for component items should be automatically suggested based on the requirements of individual segments.

We cannot use the storage location for the sales order BOM line item because it is not permitted by customer requirements.

We also understand that the MRP area cannot be used in a make-to-order scenario.

Do you have any good solutions?

entry.title: Best practices for restricting physical deletion of Sales Orders
entry.content:
Hi, expert!

Background:
From the perspectives of audit compliance and data integrity, we want to prohibit the physical deletion of Sales Orders in transaction VA02. Our goal is to ensure that users consistently use "Reason for Rejection" (Logical Deletion) instead.

Question:
How can I technically prevent the physical deletion of Sales Orders? I would like to know the best approach—whether it's through authorizations, status management, or other standard configurations.

entry.title: Use of Service Materials (DIEN) in Advanced Intercompany Sales (5D2)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently working on a project where we need to map a service sales flow to a customer. This service is executed by a subsidiary company within the same group.

Regarding Scope Item 5D2 (Advanced Intercompany Sales), I have the following questions:

  1. Can I use a DIEN (Service) material type directly in this flow?

  2. If DIEN is not supported, would it be a valid workaround to create a custom material type (e.g., copied from FERT) but configured as non-valued and non-stockable?

I want to ensure the advanced intercompany logic (including the automated intercompany billing and postings) triggers correctly for a service-based scenario.

Has anyone implemented a similar flow for services using 5D2, or is there a better scope item for intercompany services?

Thanks in advance for your insights!

entry.title: SAP Document Reporting and Compliance Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I would like to know what are the differences of using SAP Document compliance and Reporting Cloud Edition compared to the scope id 5XU (SAP Document compliance and Reporting)? If we are using SAP Document Compliance and Cloud edition, then do the edocuments created appear in the edocument cockpit inside S4 or is it available only in BTP cockpit?

entry.title: WBS views help account assigment contract sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

currenlty i create a role to cover the requirement for the user and i already manage the restriction for the role.

when i test the role, when i want to add WBS in the account assignment, the WBS doenst appear when i use change sales contract VA42 but when i use app change sales order VA02 the wbs appear when i want to add in the account assignment.

 

if the wbs appear when in sales order transaction, why the wbs doesnt appear in the contract transaction ? 

i dont understand why the restriction only run in the sales order and it doesnt work in the contract

 

please let me know if there any missing restriction that i must configured in the role

 

Thankyou

entry.title: How to add new variants in the apps Manage Archiving Variants
entry.content:
According to the app's library, at the bottom of the apps [Manage Archiving Variants], the button of [Add New Variants] should be showed.
But in our system, the button [Add New Variants] is not showed. 
Is there anyone the reason?

The related business role [SAP_BR_DATA_PRIVACY_SPECIALIST] does not exist in our system, too.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
#Manage Archiving Variants

entry.title: Doubtful Receivables – Provision Method
entry.content:
Hello,

When using the application “Schedule General Ledger Jobs” to run the Transfer Posting for Doubtful Receivables process, we could not find the provision method for the company code 2310 (Italy)tar.

We also tried to create a provision method for Italy, but we were unable to find where this can be configured.

Could you please help us by showing where we can create a new provision method?

Thank you.

entry.title: SPPC Revenue Recognition Key for Enterprise Projects
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to use SPCC Periodic Services Revenue recognition key for Enterprise project. 

Reason-

1. We understand that this key is mostly used for Customer projects in Professional Services. 

2. We wanted to use Enterprise projects only as we do not want to confuse Business users with another type of project as we mainly are dealing with Enterprise projects. 

Analysis-

1. According to the attached note, even though the keys are not in dropdown, you can input the key manually in the project, so I have included the key manually 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3656776

2. But during the Rev Rec run, i am getting this error. 

3. From what I can find that the error asks for Revenue Plan for Customer projects, so its not picking up the revenue plan for Enterprise project.

4. I tried to configure the key for Enterprise project, but system does not allow to create a new combination. 

 

Question- Is there any other way to use SPPC Rev Rec key in Enterprise project or any other workaround?

entry.title: How to process Mass retirement of assets in SAP S4 Hana Cloud - Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi

which application can process mass retirement of assets in SAP S4 Hana Cloud - Public Edition which is similar like T-code AR31 or AR01 in On Premise version.

Is there any reason the similar apps are not available in Public Edition.

entry.title: Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation – Posting Split Logic
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am currently working with the Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation process in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

The valuation job is posting correctly, and the account determination is also clear.

My question is about the logic that is used to split the valuation results into different journal entries in the job.

I would like to understand which criteria the system uses to decide why some valuation items are posted in one journal entry and others in a different one.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Romanian Statutory Reports
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently working on generating the statutory financial reports required in Romania using S/4HANA Public Cloud and the Run Statutory Reports app (SAF‑T Statement 406, Statement 394 – General Ledger Journal, Statement 390, TriaI balance with 4types of equalities, Account sheet for miscellaneous operations ,...).

All configuration has been completed following the official SAP Help documentation (Document and Reporting Compliance). However, the client reports that the standard outputs do not comply with Romanian legal requirements, and several validations have been rejected.

Given that the standard reports are not being accepted, we would like to understand:

  1. Is there any extensibility option (CDS view, BAdI, configuration point, or other mechanism) that allows adapting statutory tax reports for Romania in Public Cloud?
  2. Is there any official SAP note, roadmap item, or localization guideline specifically addressing Romanian statutory reporting compliance?
  3. Has anyone successfully implemented these reports in Public Cloud for Romania and can share insights or known limitations?

We are currently stuck because the client expects legally compliant reports, and we need to confirm whether adaptation is possible or if the standard solution must be used as‑is.

Any guidance, experience, or documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards,

Jessica Aguilar

entry.title: Mass update of Control indicators for MICs which are assigned into Master Recipe
entry.content: Wanted to update control indicators for MICs which are assigned into Master Recipe phase via mass. Currently no option available to update in mass

entry.title: Missing documentation to standard posting rules
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We need the documentation for all posting rules in electronic account processing.

The list provided I the Sap Help Portal Posting Rules | SAP Help Portal, does not provide a number of those posting rules provided as a Standard, specifically, those listed in the attached file “Make Global Setting for Electronic Bank Statements.xlsx”, that are an export from the standard settings in this configuration step.

 

Could you please provide them?

Many thanks for your support.


Best regards,

 

Marcelo Künstler

entry.title: Asset data migration inconsistent
entry.content:
Dear support,

We are testing asset migration in asset accounting using migration cockpit.

For first test, we migrated one asset from company code 3000. In "Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting-Specific" app we have maintained 30.06.2026 as data transfer. Go live will be on july 1st 2026.

The system is calculating depreciation values not consistent with the customizing. In customizing, for the asset class used the useful life is 50 years. For the National Code 2015 used in this asset is 2% tax depreciation. This is correct.

Please see values below:

  • Asset 10000002-0 
  • Capitalized on 01.01.1998
  • Depreciation key PT04
  • Useful life 50 years
  • Depreciation started date 01.01.1998
  • APC Transaction 498 797,90 EUR
  • Ordinary Depreciation by 31.12.2025 -279 326,89 EUR
  • Net book value by 31.12.2025 219 471,01 EUR
  • Expired useful life at 30.06.2026 28 years and 6 months.
  • Posted depreciation by 30.06.2026  -4 987,98 EUR

According to asset master data previously mentioned the yearly depreciation is 498 797,90 EUR/50y = 9975,96 EUR. The system is calculating annual depreciation as 10207,95 EUR instead of 9975,96 EUR. The system is using 2,05% instead of 2%, as configured.

Any ideas?

Thanks, Marlene

entry.title: Testing SEPA payments, CAMT.053 bank statements and bank connection in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edit
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working as a Junior Consultant on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and we are looking for a practical way to test SEPA payments, CAMT.053 bank statements, general bank transaction processing and the actual bank connection.

Our main issue is that we do not currently have access to a real demo or sandbox bank account for ERP-to-bank testing.

We contacted banks such as DZ Bank and UniCredit. UniCredit clarified that their PSD2 XS2A sandbox is only intended for PSD2 API testing and does not support classic ERP scenarios such as:

  • SEPA batch payments
  • SEPA direct debits
  • pain.001 file-based payment initiation
  • CAMT or MT bank statement files
  • dedicated ERP test bank accounts

From our understanding, PSD2 sandboxes are therefore not sufficient for testing classic SAP payment file and bank statement processes.

We also found in SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity documentation that many banks using EBICS do not provide a dedicated test environment. In such cases, payment testing may need to be done via small “penny tests” in production, coordinated with the bank.

At the moment, we see three possible options:

  1. Import synthetic or sample CAMT.053 files into SAP to test only the inbound bank statement process.
  2. Use SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity validation options, if MBC is available.
  3. Coordinate small production test payments with the bank.

My questions are:

  1. How did other projects test the actual bank connection itself in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  2. Did you use a dedicated bank demo/test system, SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity validation, a third-party provider, or another approach?
  3. How do other SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition projects in Germany test SEPA payment files and CAMT.053 bank statements without a real bank sandbox?
  4. Are there banks, providers or tools that offer realistic ERP/banking test environments for SEPA and CAMT testing?
  5. Is manual CAMT.053 test file creation the usual approach for inbound bank statement testing?
  6. For full end-to-end payment testing, is a production penny test usually the only realistic option?

Any practical experience, recommendations, contacts or lessons learned would be highly appreciated.

Best regards,
Tobias

entry.title: SAP AFC - Open/Close periods with RFOB5200 in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

SAP AFC can open/close periods with RFOB5200 for onPrem and private Cloud.

How is this possible in Public Cloud? The job is not available if I try to "Create Task from Model".

Thanks and Kind Regards

Sven Wlk

entry.title: WM Public Cloud Storage Type Authorization & Stock Consolidation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Warehouse Management.

I have two related requirements:

1) Authorization Requirement (Storage Type Level)

I need to control user access based on warehouse storage type.

Business requirement:

  • Users should only be able to:
    • View stock
    • Create and confirm warehouse tasks
  • Only for specific storage types, not the entire warehouse

My questions:

  • Is there any standard Public Cloud WM functionality to restrict user access at storage type level?
  • Can this be controlled using business roles, restriction fields, or IAM configuration?
  • If not, what is the recommended workaround?

2) Warehouse Bin Cleanup / Stock Consolidation / Rearrangement

Business requirement:

  • Consolidate partial quantities of the same product where possible
  • Reduce scattered stock across many bins
  • Free up unnecessary occupied bins
  • Move stock between bins to improve warehouse organization
  • Clean up bin utilization after normal inbound/outbound operations

In EWM, this requirement sounds close to rearrangement, consolidation, slotting/rearrangement, or warehouse optimization functionality. However, in Public Cloud WM, I cannot find a standard automatic process that analyzes current bin stock and proposes cleanup/consolidation warehouse tasks.

My questions:

  • Is there any standard Public Cloud WM functionality to automatically propose warehouse tasks for bin cleanup, consolidation, or rearrangement?
  • If not, what is the recommended workaround?

Any practical configuration approach or workaround would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance.
